prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame

description: add counting methodology and partial visibility
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Count each distinct individual separately, including those partially visible at the edges of the frame. Report the current count even if it has not changed.

description: always report exact count, check edges/occlusion
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Always report the exact count, even if zero. Look carefully for people who may be partially occluded or at the edges.

description: emphasize updating count on changes including to zero
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Update the count whenever it changes, including changes to zero.

description: system prompt example wording: Keep track of number of people
prompt: Keep track of number of people
How many people are visible in the frame?

description: report format with Currently N people
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame and report as 'Currently N people visible'
Count the number of people visible in the frame by scanning from left to right
Count the number of distinct people visible in the frame
Monitor and count the number of people visible in the frame as they enter and leave
Observe the frame and count all persons visible, including partially visible ones
Track the headcount of people visible in the frame

description: determine the number of people present
prompt: Determine the number of people present in the frame
